  • Method Details

    • markforDelGroup

      @Query(nativeQuery=true) void markforDelGroup(Integer idUser, Integer idReplyToLocal)
      Marks a group of related mail messages (a conversation thread) as deleted for a specific user. This is achieved by inserting new records into the mail_send_recv_read_del table with mark_hide_del = 1, or updating existing ones if they already exist (ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE).

      The SQL query identifies messages belonging to the specified idReplyToLocal (conversation thread ID) that are relevant to the given idUser. This includes:

      1. Messages received by the user as part of a role, considering the user's role membership start time.
      2. Messages directly sent by or received by the user within that conversation thread.
      3. Other messages within the same role-based conversation thread that the user might have visibility to (e.g., public replies in a role discussion, or private replies if the user was the sender of the original role message), again considering role membership start times.
      For all identified messages, a corresponding entry in mail_send_recv_read_del is created or updated to set mark_hide_del = 1 and has_been_read = 0 (as this operation only marks for deletion, not as read).
      Parameters:
      idUser - The ID of the user for whom the message group should be marked as deleted.
      idReplyToLocal - The ID that identifies the conversation thread/group of messages.

    • markHideForExternalOnlyAnnouncement

      @Transactional @Modifying @Query(nativeQuery=true) void markHideForExternalOnlyAnnouncement(Integer idMailSendRecv, Integer idRoleTo, Byte messageComType, Byte messageTargetType)
      Pre-marks a role-addressed admin announcement as hidden for every member of the given role who has chosen to receive that announcement type via external email only.

      For each user in idRoleTo that has a MailSettingForward entry with the supplied messageComType and messageTargetType, a mail_send_recv_read_del row is inserted for the given message with mark_hide_del = 1 (and has_been_read = 0). The MailSendRecv.findByUserOrGroup query filters such rows out, so the announcement no longer appears in the user's internal inbox while remaining intact for all other role members. The external email is delivered separately by the calling service.

      The insert is idempotent via ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE mark_hide_del = 1, so re-running it does not create duplicate rows or fail. Named query: MailSendRecvReadDel.markHideForExternalOnlyAnnouncement

      Parameters:
      idMailSendRecv - the id of the role-addressed RECEIVE message to hide
      idRoleTo - the role the message is addressed to; limits the affected users to that role's members
      messageComType - the message communication type value (e.g. USER_ADMIN_ANNOUNCEMENT)
      messageTargetType - the target type value identifying email-only users (e.g. EXTERNAL_MAIL)
